Download

Alma for macOS. Native Swift app. Connects to the Flask backend.

Download Alma

Latest release

Version 0.3.5. Released July 8, 2026.

Alma-0.3.5.dmg
1 MB
SHA256: 3a70c7e89a4177543232421900faca84ccc8ce14561b859e84d507b3e669eb4c

Requirements

  • macOS 14.0 or later
  • Alma backend running on localhost:8080
  • Gemini API key configured in the backend

Install

  1. Download the DMG from GitHub Releases.
  2. Open the DMG and drag Alma to Applications.
  3. Start the backend: ./scripts/run-dev.sh all
  4. Open Alma. It connects to localhost:8080 automatically.

What is included

  • NavigationSplitView, sidebar with conversation list and detail view.
  • Composer, text input with send button and attachment support.
  • Markdown rendering, responses render as Markdown using the MarkdownUI library.
  • Conversation management, create, rename, delete, search, switch.
  • Theme support, system, light, and dark themes.
  • Auto-titling, conversations are titled automatically from the first message.

Not included yet

  • Search mode
  • Thinking mode
  • Voice playback
  • Image paste and drag-and-drop
  • Keyboard shortcut configuration

These features work in the web frontend. The Swift app will get them in future releases.

Source

The Swift app source is in the Alma repository under the swift/ directory. Built with SwiftUI, Swift Concurrency, and the MarkdownUI library.

Found something unexpected? Report an issue.
